Response 218543652

Delivered $2M Proposal for A Stackable Certificate Program Featuring ULCs

Community Engagement (CE) - co-designed or co-developed work with an external partner.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

Engaged Hilton in a strategic partnership to co-create next-generation, accessible hospitality learning models. Delivered a $2M proposal for a stackable certificate program featuring ULCs, microcredentials, and an early pipeline strategy targeting high school learners, with the goal of scaling wo...
